TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, motorized vehicle" singangan aca tu kikayay a kazizeng, kazizeng "motor vehicle", lunuk a kazizeng "motor vehicle" aca automobile" kazizeng "car" u inzing ku sapisaungay anca matengtenganay a kazizang, atu miida tu icelang nu tademaw anca u icelang nu aadupen caay ku nu kazizeng a kalalecad. ś©üŚčēŤĽäŤľõ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:motorized vehicle) (automotive vehicleśąĖautomobile)śąĖśĪĹŤĽä , . nilaculan "kazizeng" u kamu nu imin angangan i zazan muculil ku bihelay a kazizeng, pasu silyenaay a kazizeng anca paculil i zazan nu silamalay a akazizeng "silamalay, sasa silamalay a zazan, mahemaway a zazan cacayay a zazan", kanahatu zikuzay tu tusaay a nizateng hatu tungusay nu kazizeng. nitatengaan nu huluc a kazizeng kapah pahamin han palabasu "mikacawan tu kazizeng passenger vehicle" atu miculu'ay tu tuud a kazizeng "u picukaymasan a kazizeng "utility vehicle" tusa ku kasasizuma, " ŚíĆŤ≤®ťĀč ŚÖ©Ś§ßť°ě, nuayawan duduc tu icelang nu miculu'ay atu pasasuma batikal "mahiniay utubay" uzipay a kazizeng "pasu kazizeng, nisekian a utubay, sihakuay a kazizeng atu sapilabim a kazizeng kahatini, atu labanng tuuday tusaay ku picukaymas nu pi-ka-ciw "labang a kazizeng "duduc ku sapicukaymas u basu labang kazizeng, yulansya atu tanayu'ay ku piculil nu labang a kizizeng, atu taylin a kazizeng, paisingay a kazizeng, mapatayay a kazizeng, zikuzay, a kasasizuma mikelidaay tu tuud a pitupinan tu tuud a kazizeng "tulaku" atu sisimalay a kazizeng, angangan mitengteng tu kazizeng anca a kazize ng nu pawapenay tu kazizeng, micaitay a kazizeng atu mitengtengay, u sapitupin tu lala' kilang a kikay nu misakakawaway a kazizeng "mahiniay micai'tay a kazizeng, micuzuhay tu lalaa' a kazizeng, milacul a kazizeng, mikukutay a kazizeng, mipenecay tu zazan a kazizeng, misaupuay a kazizeng", atu mipadengan tu lamal a kazizeng, mibasbasay tu nanum a kazizeng, tatuni' a kazizengan hatini mikawaway tu kapulunga a kazizeng. sinilacul tu baketay a sapilais a sazikec sapicukaymas nu hitay a kazizeng pulung a ngangan lepacaw a kazizeng. saayaway a icelang nu kazizeng namakayzaay i lahud, nika makay sakatusa a sakakawawan zikuz angangan namakay labu nu akuti' "simal nu inzing anca simal a inzing" anca tengtengay nu dingkiay utubay, micumud tu 21 se-ci zikuz malingatu mangaleb u malalamel ku icelang atu batiliay a icelang. kazizeng a kalamkam atu nipabesbes kikatalakawaan ku cayay ku kazizeng, cunus tu baket nu uzip nu kazizeng atu baket ku nitupin, anu caay pihaymaw ku nipaculil a pihaceng ku satebuc, i kitakit a kasa kanatal u kahenulan ku saculil a hulic, u mikedecay tu kalamkam nu kazizeng atu miduduc tu nitelekan a lihalay ku kazizeng, mabatelu ku kazizeng caay kalecad tu cayay ku kazizeng atu miculilay i zazan tademaw hamin caay kalecad ku icelang a situngu atu bacuen a salikec . paculilay tu kazizeng amilakuit tu nipatucek nu mikuwana tu saculilan miseking pakala tu minkiw amalepun sibangngu ku kazizeng misinsi kya kapah paculil i zazan, nika zuma mahaymaway ku culil tu ahemaway a kazizeng "mahiniay dingkiay a utubay, dingkiay miculil atu utubayay a batikal" zuma a kakitizaan hakay mapala caay ku kazizeng, , nika zuma a kakitizaan atu malecad a kazizeng kanca amiawas tu pikinsa amiala tu minkiw nu sapaculil paninaku dingkiay a batikal i Cow-kow-talu u Cong-hwa-ze-min-kung-he-kow u paketun nu hulic u cayay a kazizeng, nika i Syang-kangn nu micidekay a kitizaan Syang-kang a hulic palakazizengen, amisinsi tu minkiw nu sapaculil tu dingkiay utubay. . malalitin tu i hekalan atu zumaay a natinengay
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kaziz…ôŇč "kamu nu iŇč, motoriz…ôd *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, kaziz…ôŇč "motor *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô", r~…ĺunuk a kaziz…ôŇč "motor *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" a ¶a automobir~…ĺ…ô" kaziz…ôŇč " ¶ar" u inziŇč ku sapisauŇčaj an ¶a mat…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj a kazizaŇč, atu miida tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw an ¶a u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu aadup…ôn ¶aaj ku nu kaziz…ôŇč a kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. ****(**:motoriz…ôd *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô) (automoti*…ô *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô*automobir~…ĺ…ô)*** , . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan "kaziz…ôŇč" u kamu nu imin aŇčaŇčan i zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku bińß…ôr~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč, pasu sir~…ĺj…ônaaj a kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i zazan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a akaziz…ôŇč "sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, sasa sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan, mańß…ômawaj a zazan ¶a ¶ajaj a zazan", kanańßatu zikuzaj tu tusaaj a nizat…ôŇč ńßatu tuŇčusaj nu kaziz…ôŇč. nitat…ôŇčaan nu ńßur~…ĺu ¶ a kaziz…ôŇč kapańß pańßamin ńßan par~…ĺabasu "mika ¶awan tu kaziz…ôŇč pass…ôŇč…ôr *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" atu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč "u pi ¶ukajmasan a kaziz…ôŇč "utir~…ĺitj *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" tusa ku kasasizuma, " *** ***, nuajawan dudu ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj atu pasasuma batikar~…ĺ "mańßiniaj utubaj" uzipaj a kaziz…ôŇč "pasu kaziz…ôŇč, nis…ôkian a utubaj, sińßakuaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu sapir~…ĺabim a kaziz…ôŇč kańßatini, atu r~…ĺabanŇč tuudaj tusaaj ku pi ¶ukajmas nu pi-ka- ¶iw "r~…ĺabaŇč a kaziz…ôŇč "dudu ¶ ku sapi ¶ukajmas u basu r~…ĺabaŇč kaziz…ôŇč, jur~…ĺansja atu tanaju Ē~ °aj ku pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu r~…ĺabaŇč a kiziz…ôŇč, atu tajr~…ĺin a kaziz…ôŇč, paisiŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mapatajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, zikuzaj, a kasasizuma mik…ôr~…ĺidaaj tu tuud a pitupinan tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč "tur~…ĺaku" atu sisimar~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč, aŇčaŇčan mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a a kaziz…ô Ňč nu pawap…ônaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, mi ¶aitaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj, u sapitupin tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kir~…ĺaŇč a kikaj nu misakakawawaj a kaziz…ôŇč "mańßiniaj mi ¶ai Ē~ °taj a kaziz…ôŇč, mi ¶uzuńßaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaa Ē~ ° a kaziz…ôŇč, mir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, mikukutaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mip…ôn…ô ¶aj tu zazan a kaziz…ôŇč, misaupuaj a kaziz…ôŇč", atu mipad…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, mibasbasaj tu nanum a kaziz…ôŇč, tatuni Ē~ ° a kaziz…ôŇčan ńßatini mikawawaj tu kapur~…ĺuŇča a kaziz…ôŇč. sinir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu bak…ôtaj a sapir~…ĺais a sazik…ô ¶ sapi ¶ukajmas nu ńßitaj a kaziz…ôŇč pur~…ĺuŇč a ŇčaŇčan r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw a kaziz…ôŇč. saajawaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kaziz…ôŇč namakajzaaj i r~…ĺańßud, nika makaj sakatusa a sakakawawan zikuz aŇčaŇčan namakaj r~…ĺabu nu akuti Ē~ ° "simar~…ĺ nu inziŇč an ¶a simar~…ĺ a inziŇč" an ¶a t…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj nu diŇčkiaj utubaj, mi ¶umud tu ** s…ô- ¶i zikuz mar~…ĺiŇčatu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb u mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu batir~…ĺiaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. kaziz…ôŇč a kar~…ĺamkam atu nipab…ôsb…ôs kikatar~…ĺakawaan ku ¶ajaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, ¶unus tu bak…ôt nu uzip nu kaziz…ôŇč atu bak…ôt ku nitupin, anu ¶aaj pińßajmaw ku nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku sat…ôbu ¶, i kitakit a kasa kanatar~…ĺ u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, u mik…ôd…ô ¶aj tu kar~…ĺamkam nu kaziz…ôŇč atu midudu ¶ tu nit…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, mabat…ôr~…ĺu ku kaziz…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶ajaj ku kaziz…ôŇč atu mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj i zazan tad…ômaw ńßamin ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a situŇču atu ba ¶u…ôn a sar~…ĺik…ô ¶ . pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu kaziz…ôŇč amir~…ĺakuit tu nipatu ¶…ôk nu mikuwana tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan mis…ôkiŇč pakar~…ĺa tu minkiw amar~…ĺ…ôpun sibaŇčŇču ku kaziz…ôŇč misinsi kja kapańß pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i zazan, nika zuma mańßajmawaj ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ańß…ômawaj a kaziz…ôŇč "mańßiniaj diŇčkiaj a utubaj, diŇčkiaj mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu utubajaj a batikar~…ĺ" zuma a kakitizaan ńßakaj mapar~…ĺa ¶aaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, , nika zuma a kakitizaan atu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kaziz…ôŇč kan ¶a amiawas tu pikinsa amiar~…ĺa tu minkiw nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ paninaku diŇčkiaj a batikar~…ĺ i ¶ow-kow-tar~…ĺu u ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ô-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow u pak…ôtun nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u ¶ajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, nika i sjaŇč-kaŇčn nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kitizaan sjaŇč-kaŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ par~…ĺakaziz…ôŇč…ôn, amisinsi tu minkiw nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu diŇčkiaj utubaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺan atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčaj
S.FORM: == kakiliman == kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, motorized vehicle" singangan aca tu kikayay a kazizeng, kazizeng "motor vehicle", lunuk a kazizeng "motor vehicle" aca automobile" kazizeng "car" u inzing ku sapisaungay anca matengtenganay a kazizang, atu miida tu icelang nu tademaw anca u icelang nu aadupen caay ku nu kazizeng a kalalecad. ś©üŚčēŤĽäŤľõ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:motorized vehicle) (automotive vehicleśąĖautomobile)śąĖśĪĹŤĽä , . nilaculan "kazizeng" u kamu nu imin angangan i zazan muculil ku bihelay a kazizeng, pasu silyenaay a kazizeng anca paculil i zazan nu silamalay a akazizeng "silamalay, sasa silamalay a zazan, mahemaway a zazan cacayay a zazan", kanahatu zikuzay tu tusaay a nizateng hatu tungusay nu kazizeng. nitatengaan nu huluc a kazizeng kapah pahamin han palabasu "mikacawan tu kazizeng passenger vehicle" atu miculu'ay tu tuud a kazizeng "u picukaymasan a kazizeng "utility vehicle" tusa ku kasasizuma, " ŚíĆŤ≤®ťĀč ŚÖ©Ś§ßť°ě, nuayawan duduc tu icelang nu miculu'ay atu pasasuma batikal "mahiniay utubay" uzipay a kazizeng "pasu kazizeng, nisekian a utubay, sihakuay a kazizeng atu sapilabim a kazizeng kahatini, atu labanng tuuday tusaay ku picukaymas nu pi-ka-ciw "labang a kazizeng "duduc ku sapicukaymas u basu labang kazizeng, yulansya atu tanayu'ay ku piculil nu labang a kizizeng, atu taylin a kazizeng, paisingay a kazizeng, mapatayay a kazizeng, zikuzay, a kasasizuma mikelidaay tu tuud a pitupinan tu tuud a kazizeng "tulaku" atu sisimalay a kazizeng, angangan mitengteng tu kazizeng anca a kazize ng nu pawapenay tu kazizeng, micaitay a kazizeng atu mitengtengay, u sapitupin tu lala' kilang a kikay nu misakakawaway a kazizeng "mahiniay micai'tay a kazizeng, micuzuhay tu lalaa' a kazizeng, milacul a kazizeng, mikukutay a kazizeng, mipenecay tu zazan a kazizeng, misaupuay a kazizeng", atu mipadengan tu lamal a kazizeng, mibasbasay tu nanum a kazizeng, tatuni' a kazizengan hatini mikawaway tu kapulunga a kazizeng. sinilacul tu baketay a sapilais a sazikec sapicukaymas nu hitay a kazizeng pulung a ngangan lepacaw a kazizeng. saayaway a icelang nu kazizeng namakayzaay i lahud, nika makay sakatusa a sakakawawan zikuz angangan namakay labu nu akuti' "simal nu inzing anca simal a inzing" anca tengtengay nu dingkiay utubay, micumud tu 21 se-ci zikuz malingatu mangaleb u malalamel ku icelang atu batiliay a icelang. kazizeng a kalamkam atu nipabesbes kikatalakawaan ku cayay ku kazizeng, cunus tu baket nu uzip nu kazizeng atu baket ku nitupin, anu caay pihaymaw ku nipaculil a pihaceng ku satebuc, i kitakit a kasa kanatal u kahenulan ku saculil a hulic, u mikedecay tu kalamkam nu kazizeng atu miduduc tu nitelekan a lihalay ku kazizeng, mabatelu ku kazizeng caay kalecad tu cayay ku kazizeng atu miculilay i zazan tademaw hamin caay kalecad ku icelang a situngu atu bacuen a salikec . paculilay tu kazizeng amilakuit tu nipatucek nu mikuwana tu saculilan miseking pakala tu minkiw amalepun sibangngu ku kazizeng misinsi kya kapah paculil i zazan, nika zuma mahaymaway ku culil tu ahemaway a kazizeng "mahiniay dingkiay a utubay, dingkiay miculil atu utubayay a batikal" zuma a kakitizaan hakay mapala caay ku kazizeng, , nika zuma a kakitizaan atu malecad a kazizeng kanca amiawas tu pikinsa amiala tu minkiw nu sapaculil paninaku dingkiay a batikal i Cow-kow-talu u Cong-hwa-ze-min-kung-he-kow u paketun nu hulic u cayay a kazizeng, nika i Syang-kangn nu micidekay a kitizaan Syang-kang a hulic palakazizengen, amisinsi tu minkiw nu sapaculil tu dingkiay utubay. . malalitin tu i hekalan atu zumaay a natinengay

zikuzaj, a kasasizuma mik…ôr~…ĺidaaj tu tuud a pitupinan tu tuud a kaziz…ôŇč "tur~…ĺaku" atu sisimar~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč, aŇčaŇčan mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a a kaziz…ô Ňč nu pawap…ônaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, tatuni Ē~ ° a kaziz…ôŇčan ńßatini mikawawaj tu kapur~…ĺuŇča a kaziz…ôŇč. sinir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu bak…ôtaj a sapir~…ĺais a sazik…ô ¶ sapi ¶ukajmas nu ńßitaj a kaziz…ôŇč pur~…ĺuŇč a ŇčaŇčan r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw a kaziz…ôŇč. saajawaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kaziz…ôŇč namakajzaaj i r~…ĺańßud, nika makaj sakatusa a sakakawawan zikuz aŇčaŇčan namakaj r~…ĺabu nu akuti Ē~ ° "simar~…ĺ nu inziŇč an ¶a simar~…ĺ a inziŇč" an ¶a t…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj nu diŇčkiaj utubaj, mi ¶umud tu ** s…ô- ¶i zikuz mar~…ĺiŇčatu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb u mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu batir~…ĺiaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. kaziz…ôŇč a kar~…ĺamkam atu nipab…ôsb…ôs kikatar~…ĺakawaan ku ¶ajaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, ¶unus tu bak…ôt nu uzip nu kaziz…ôŇč atu bak…ôt ku nitupin, anu ¶aaj pińßajmaw ku nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku sat…ôbu ¶, i kitakit a kasa kanatar~…ĺ u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, u mik…ôd…ô ¶aj tu kar~…ĺamkam nu kaziz…ôŇč atu midudu ¶ tu nit…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, mabat…ôr~…ĺu ku kaziz…ôŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶ajaj ku kaziz…ôŇč atu mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj i zazan tad…ômaw ńßamin ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a situŇču atu ba ¶u…ôn a sar~…ĺik…ô ¶ . pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu kaziz…ôŇč amir~…ĺakuit tu nipatu ¶…ôk nu mikuwana tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan mis…ôkiŇč pakar~…ĺa tu minkiw amar~…ĺ…ôpun sibaŇčŇču ku kaziz…ôŇč misinsi kja kapańß pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i zazan, nika zuma mańßajmawaj ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ańß…ômawaj a kaziz…ôŇč "mańßiniaj diŇčkiaj a utubaj, diŇčkiaj mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu utubajaj a batikar~…ĺ" zuma a kakitizaan ńßakaj mapar~…ĺa ¶aaj ku kaziz…ôŇč, , nika zuma a kakitizaan atu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kaziz…ôŇč kan ¶a amiawas tu pikinsa amiar~…ĺa tu minkiw nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ paninaku diŇčkiaj a batikar~…ĺ i ¶ow-kow-tar~…ĺu u ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ô-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow u pak…ôtun nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ u ¶ajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, nika i sjaŇč-kaŇčn nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kitizaan sjaŇč-kaŇč a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ par~…ĺakaziz…ôŇč…ôn, amisinsi tu minkiw nu sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu diŇčkiaj utubaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺan atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčaj
